LOGIN.HERO_DESC: Join thousands of successful vendors on the Coupony platform and expand your business in the largest food marketplace.
LOGIN.ERR_LOGIN_FAILED: Unable to sign in. Please check your details and try again.
LOGIN.ERR_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
LOGIN.ERR_ACCOUNT_NOT_ALLOWED: This account is not allowed to sign in right now.
LOGIN.ERR_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: This account is temporarily locked. Please contact support or try again later.
LOGIN.ERR_SERVER_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach the server right now. Make sure the API is running or check your network connection, then try again.

SUCCESS_PAGE.TITLE: Application Submitted Successfully!

ERRORS.START_FROM_REGISTER: Please start from the register page first to complete the account credentials.

SECTIONS.OVERVIEW_HINT: Comprehensive summary of operational and financial performance.
SECTIONS.OPERATIONS_HINT: What needs action right now across orders and fulfillment.
SECTIONS.SALES_HINT: Revenue, order quality, category performance, and weak spots.
SECTIONS.INVENTORY_HINT: Stock health, catalog movement, and products that need intervention.

FINANCE.BRANCH_REVENUE_HINT: Paid revenue is broken down by branch so you can distinguish branch performance clearly.

PRODUCTS.LIST_SUBTITLE: View and edit your product stock and prices
PRODUCTS.EMPTY_DESC: Start by adding products from the general catalog
PRODUCTS.BANK_SUBTITLE: Choose from available products in the master catalog
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_HINT: If you can't find the product, you can request to add it
PRODUCTS.REQUESTS_SUBTITLE: Track the product, brand, and category requests you have sent to the Coupony team.
PRODUCTS.REQUESTS_EMPTY_DESC: When you submit a new product, brand, or category request, it will appear here right away.
PRODUCTS.AGREE_POLICIES: I agree to product listing and pricing policies.
PRODUCTS.CATALOG_DESC_NOTE: This description comes from the master catalog and cannot be edited here.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_MISSING_BRAND_HINT: Turn this on if the product belongs to a brand that does not exist yet.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_MISSING_CATEGORY_HINT: Turn this on if you need a completely new category for this product.
PRODUCTS.BRAND_MODAL_DESC: Pick an existing brand or create a new one.
PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_MODAL_DESC: Pick an existing category or add a new one with hierarchy details.
PRODUCTS.DETAILS_SUBTITLE: Review product details, pricing, and stock.
PRODUCTS.DISCOUNT_HELPER: Enter the discount percentage to calculate the original price automatically.
PRODUCTS.PRICING_STOCK_HINT: Update prices and stock — changes apply to your store immediately.
PRODUCTS.CATALOG_INFO_HINT: Data from the master catalog — read only.
PRODUCTS.TRADE_PRICE_REQUIRED_NOTE: This product needs a trade price before it is ready for live orders.
PRODUCTS.VALIDATION_INCOMPLETE: Please make sure to fill all required fields correctly (like selling price and trade price).
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_NEW_SUBTITLE: Submit a request to add a new product to the master catalog.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_ACTION_HEALTHY: Stock looks healthy for current order flow. Keep the count aligned with your actual shelf quantity.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_ACTION_LOW: Stock is getting tight. Refill soon so automatic pickup deduction does not push the item out of stock.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_ACTION_OUT: This item is already out of stock. Restock first before reactivating or promoting it.
PRODUCTS.STOCK_AUTOMATION_BODY: Inventory now follows the live order flow. Quantity is deducted when the driver picks up the order, then restored automatically if delivery fails or the order is refunded.
PRODUCTS.SUBMIT_NEW_PRODUCT_DESC: If you cannot find your product in the catalog, request to add it now.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_SUBMITTED_SUCCESS: Product request submitted successfully, it will be reviewed by admin.
PRODUCTS.REQUEST_SUBMIT_FAILED: Could not submit the product request. Please review the details and try again.
PRODUCTS.NAME_MIN_LENGTH: Name must be at least 3 characters
PRODUCTS.CATEGORY_SELECTION_REQUIRED: Please select a category or create a new one from the category dialog
PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_IMAGES_HINT: You can upload up to 5 images. The first image will be the primary one.

ERROR_CODES.PRODUCT_REQUEST_BRAND_CONFLICT: Choose either an existing brand or a new brand request, not both.
ERROR_CODES.PRODUCT_REQUEST_CATEGORY_CONFLICT: Choose either an existing category or a new category request, not both.
ERROR_CODES.BRAND_CATEGORY_MISMATCH: The selected brand does not belong to the selected category.
ERROR_CODES.INVALID_MEASUREMENT_VALUE: Measurement value must be greater than zero.
ERROR_CODES.PRODUCT_REQUEST_ALREADY_PENDING: A matching product request is already pending review.
ERROR_CODES.PRODUCT_ALREADY_EXISTS: This product already exists in the catalog. Add it to your store instead of creating a new request.
ERROR_CODES.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check the required fields and try again.

BULK.TITLE: Bulk Add From Product Bank
BULK.SUBTITLE: Review trade price, selling price, and stock before submit.
BULK.DEFAULTS_HINT: Apply default values to selected rows or to all rows at once.
BULK.SUBMIT_ERROR: Bulk add could not be submitted. Review the data and try again.
BULK.SUBMIT_TIMEOUT: Bulk add is taking longer than expected. Try again, or refresh the products list in a moment.

VALIDATION.TRADE_REQUIRED: Trade price is required and must be greater than zero.
VALIDATION.SELLING_REQUIRED: Selling price is required and must be greater than zero.
VALIDATION.TRADE_GT_SELLING: Trade price cannot be greater than selling price.
VALIDATION.DISCOUNT_RANGE: Discount percentage must be between 0 and less than 100.

ERRORS.ALREADY_EXISTS: Product already exists in your store.
ERRORS.BRANCH_INVALID: Branch is invalid for this vendor.
ERRORS.COMPARE_PRICE_INVALID: Compare-at price must be greater than selling price.
ERRORS.TRADE_GT_SELLING: Trade price must be less than or equal to selling price.
ERRORS.MIN_ORDER_INVALID: Minimum order quantity must be greater than zero.
ERRORS.MAX_ORDER_INVALID: Maximum order quantity must be greater than or equal to minimum order quantity.
ERRORS.DUPLICATE_ITEMS: Duplicate products are not allowed in the same bulk request.
ERRORS.BRANCHES_INVALID: One or more branch IDs do not belong to this vendor.

SUBMITTED.TITLE: Case opened

REQUEST_EVIDENCE.TITLE: More evidence requested
REQUEST_EVIDENCE.NOTE: We need additional information or evidence to continue reviewing the case for order #{{orderNumber}}.

APPROVED.TITLE: Case approved
APPROVED.NOTE: Your return request has been approved. You will be notified when the financial processing begins.

REJECTED.TITLE: Case rejected
REJECTED.NOTE: The support case linked to order #{{orderNumber}} has been rejected.

RESOLVED.TITLE: Case resolved
RESOLVED.NOTE: The support case linked to order #{{orderNumber}} has been resolved and closed.

ESCALATED.TITLE: Case escalated
ESCALATED.NOTE: The support case linked to order #{{orderNumber}} was escalated to a specialized team.

ADMIN_MESSAGE.TITLE: Admin update

DECISION.NOTE: A final decision was recorded for this case.

PUBLIC_NOTE.NOTE: A public note was added to this case.

EMPTY.TITLE: No disputes found

DETAIL.CONVERSATION_SUBTITLE: Messages visible to your team inside this case.

DETAIL.RESPONSE_FAILED: Unable to send your response right now.
DETAIL.CLOSED_BANNER: This dispute is currently closed. Additional messages or attachments cannot be sent.

TEMPLATES.ORDERS_CLERK_HINT: Focused on order queue handling, approvals, and shipment follow-up.
TEMPLATES.INVENTORY_CLERK_HINT: Designed for stock updates, inventory checks, and availability changes.

FEEDBACK.BRANCH_CREATED: The new branch was added and a manager invitation was sent by email.
FEEDBACK.EMPLOYEE_INVITED: The employee invitation was sent successfully.
FEEDBACK.LINK_COPY_FALLBACK: Copy failed here. You can still copy the link manually.
FEEDBACK.INVITATION_SEND_FAILED: The invitation email could not be sent. Check the address and email provider, then try again.
FEEDBACK.INVITATION_ACTION_FAILED: The invitation action could not be completed. Please try again.

ACCEPT.TITLE: Create your staff access
ACCEPT.SUBTITLE: You have been invited to join {{vendor}} on Coupony Vendor Panel.
ACCEPT.WEAK_PASSWORD: Enter your name and a password of at least 8 characters.
ACCEPT.FAILED: The invitation could not be accepted. It may have expired or already been used.
ACCEPT.INVALID_BODY: The invitation link is expired, revoked, or already accepted.
ACCEPT.SUCCESS_BODY: You can now sign in with the invited email and the password you just created.

BRANCH.OVERVIEW_SUBTITLE: Key operational information for this branch and its current readiness.
BRANCH.HOURS_SUBTITLE: The active schedule used by this branch across the week.
BRANCH.TEAM_SUBTITLE: Employees currently linked to this branch and their operational role.
BRANCH.EMPTY_TEAM: No employees are linked to this branch yet.
BRANCH.MANAGER_SUBTITLE: Primary contact responsible for this branch.
BRANCH.SUMMARY_SUBTITLE: Operational numbers to understand branch readiness at a glance.
BRANCH.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Recent branch-related invitations and their current status.
BRANCH.EMPTY_INVITATIONS: No invitations are linked to this branch.

EMPLOYEE.IDENTITY_SUBTITLE: Identity, role template, and the latest operational activity.
EMPLOYEE.BRANCH_ACCESS_SUBTITLE: Branches this employee can currently operate in.
EMPLOYEE.EMPTY_BRANCHES: No branches are assigned to this employee.
EMPLOYEE.INVITATIONS_SUBTITLE: Invitation records connected to this employee identity.
EMPLOYEE.EMPTY_INVITATIONS: No invitations are linked to this employee.
EMPLOYEE.PERMISSIONS_SUBTITLE: A read-only view of the effective permissions across operational modules.
EMPLOYEE.SUMMARY_SUBTITLE: A compact summary of branch access and invitation coverage.

INVITATION.OVERVIEW_SUBTITLE: Track the target, delivery window, and invitation lifecycle details.
INVITATION.BRANCHES_SUBTITLE: Branches this invitation currently grants access to.
INVITATION.EMPTY_BRANCHES: No branches are linked to this invitation.
INVITATION.LINK_SUBTITLE: Use this direct link when you need to resend or share access manually.
INVITATION.MATCH_SUBTITLE: If the invited person already exists in the team workspace, it appears here.
INVITATION.NO_MATCH: No matching employee was found yet for this invitation.
INVITATION.TIMELINE_SUBTITLE: A quick view of when the invitation was sent and where it stands now.

REVIEWS.TITLE: Customer Reviews Center
REVIEWS.SUBTITLE: Track product and order experience reviews from one workspace, reply as the vendor, and hide reviews when needed without deleting them.

SUMMARY.TOTAL_HINT: All reviews currently stored in this workspace
SUMMARY.PENDING_HINT: Reviews that still need an official vendor response
SUMMARY.HIDDEN_HINT: Reviews currently hidden from the operational view

REVIEWS.SECTION_SUBTITLE: Review every rating, open details, respond to customers, and track what needs attention.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Filter by type, stars, visibility, reply state, and date within the same table.

SEARCH.PLACEHOLDER: Search by customer, product, order number, or comment text

EMPTY.TITLE: No matching reviews
EMPTY.SUBTITLE: Try adjusting the filters or reset the demo data to reload the full review log.

DRAWER.ORDER_BREAKDOWN_SUBTITLE: Internal view of delivery, packaging, and accuracy for this review.
DRAWER.MEDIA_SUBTITLE: Images or screenshots attached to the current review.
DRAWER.REPLY_SUBTITLE: Write a clear professional response that appears as the vendor reply and can be updated later.
DRAWER.REPLY_PLACEHOLDER: Write a short professional reply that explains the action taken or the relevant clarification...

FEEDBACK.REVIEW_HIDDEN: The review was hidden from the current view.
FEEDBACK.SEED_RESET: The demo reviews data was reset.

VENDOR_FINANCE.TITLE: My Wallet
VENDOR_FINANCE.SUBTITLE: Track your balance, settlements, and payout movements with the same operational clarity used in super admin.

ACTIONS.PAYOUT_SUCCESS_MSG: Payout request submitted successfully and is pending review

BRANCHES.TITLE: Financial breakdown by branch
BRANCHES.SCOPE_HINT: Wallet balance reflects the entire store. Branch figures show sales attributed to each branch for the selected period.

ALERTS.TITLE: Action Center
ALERTS.EMPTY: All caught up. No new alerts.
ALERTS.PAYOUT_BODY: You have amounts waiting to be settled. Review recent batches or download your statement.
ALERTS.HOLD_BODY: Available balance is zero or on hold. Review orders or pending holds.
